task_completion.description: The Python script correctly formats the bookmark payload according to the task instructions.

task_completion.description: The Python script is executed successfully in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent executed the script in a terminal rather than just writing it.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create the bookmarks using the Nx Witness GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bookmarks should be created via the Python script. There should be no evidence of the agent manually clicking through the Nx Witness GUI to add bookmarks one by one.

integrity.description: The script dynamically parses the CSV rather than hardcoding the events.
